titleStmt.title: SII 24.64: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 64. (A.R. No. 113 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Seems to record a sale of tax-free land in Viḷā-nāḍu in Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu to Tuṟumūr-uḍaiyān Araiyaṉ ••••• alias Uḍaiyār Kārāṇai Viḻupparaiyar stipulating payment of a specified quantity of paddy from the 5th year of cultivation of the land. The record is dated in the 19th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭa ttu vāri Ayiṟmuṉaik kontaḷa varacar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai ṭṭip poṟpaṟi naṭātti ki ti
yai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit ten ticai temaruk kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannilap pāvai tanimaiyum tavir Intaṟṟirumaṇi makuṭam Uṟi maiyiṟ cūṭit taṉnaṭi yākat tonnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉai manuvāṟu peṟuka c ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ
ṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇum tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani peruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivāntarattu pūpar tiṟai viṭṭutan=ta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya � vaṉ karu t taṉ poṉṉakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Iṉnāḷ piṟkkula ḻai colla
llatu tan kai(yi) villetir ko(ṭa)ṭā vikkalan kallatir naṅkili ṇalūr naṭuveṉat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavun turatti Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tanmāṉamum kūṟina m kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta netikaḷum cuḻaṉṟuṭai kaṭalkaḷun talai
kanta tānum tāṉaiyum piṉṉāriṭṭamum palapalamutukum payantetir māṟicca runtiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷākoṇṭu maṭantaiyara riṭṭamu miḷā ṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅ kaṇamen ṉum pāṇi Iraṇṭum ya pukaḻe ṭamaṇṭapam koḷa ruvuḷ
ḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poruparikkalaṅka �y vantuvaṭakaṭal ten kaṭal paṭarvatu polat tan peruñce cavar Aiyvaru ḷattañci veru kka kāṭaṟattu ṟavar tammai �r tiriyum poṟṟave meṟṟi
k yastampam ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin calāpa matta veṅkari paṭumaiyyacayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaiykkoṇṭaruḷit te ṭiya kaṭala ṭuḷḷa cā� lān=ta �ṟuṭpaṭum ṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷitti
siṅhāsana ntiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramu n=tirup puyattala[ṅkaḷu ]ya vīramu n=tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka vīṟṟirun=ta[ruḷina kovirājake]sari pa(pa)nmarānac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolot tuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattoṉpatu kateva rkku śrī kāriyañ ceykiṟa naṭuvirukkai karippuṟat
ṇapaṭṭar Ēval paṭi śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyam Ā tiru varaṅka māḷi nampiyum rājādhirājaccaruppetimaṅkalattu ppanaḷūr nampiyum meṟpaṭiyūr śrītoṇṭaraṭippoṭi dāsarum ccaruppetimaṅkalattu tiruvaraṅkadāsarum mārkamaṅkalattu Arikulavāraṇa nampiyum jananātac caruppetimaṅkalattut tirukkurukūrppiccarum Ivvaṉaivomu
m śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan kurukai kāvalan Ārāvamutum Ā tiru vāykkulamuṭaiyān vanum Āritan kecuvan tani Iḷa ratāyan kecuvan Aṟivariyān �yan Ārāvamutu cirāma bhaikkaṇakku Oloka ṅkalamu ṭaiyā Anan=tanārā m śrīvayiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ārāvamutanum
Āka Ivvaṉaivom rārāyappāṇṭināṭṭu Aṇṭa nāṭṭu tuṟumūruṭaiyān Araiyan tanāta Uṭaiyār kārāṇi viḻuppaṟaiyar kkuṭutta nilamāvatu keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu A ṭṭala vasta ttecappaṭi maṇaliṭāy payira Uṇṇātu kiṭan=ta nilattil melpāṟkellai meṟku
Ivicaintu varukiṟa nāṟṟukkālukku kiḻakkum kiḻpāṟkkellai kiṭārattaraiya tiruttu rkkum vaṭapārkkellai ṭṭu nāṭa nan=tavānattukku teṟku pā lai kiḻakku nok vāykkālukku ṭām paṟṟu paḻuvūr me llai paḻuvūr Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum rākkellai kaṇṭan mayakkalukku vaṭakkum kīḻpāṟkel
lai periyanampivayakkalukku merkum vaṭapāṟkkellai paḻuvūr Ellaikkut teṟkkum ḷ paṭṭa nilamum munṟum paṟṟu mel pārk kellai kūṭalūr nīrpāyum vāykkālukku kiḻakkum kīḻpāṟkkellai mācānmaṅkalattu kkup pona vāykkālukku meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai Aticayamānarāti kkut teṟkum teṉpārkkellai Ārā
vamutu vaāykaālukku vaṭakkum Āka perunāṅkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilam veliyum Ātinārā ṟu perkūvappaṭṭu kalliyeṟina maṇṇilai niṅkalāka � 10 Innilam veliyum kaikkoṇṭu yāṇṭu pattoṉpatu mutal Aiñcu sammaṟcaram tiruttalāna nilantirutti muṟṟūṭṭuṇṭu Aiñcu samma[ tsara] (ā)ttukku pin puncey varicai veli Onṟukku nel Eṇ
kalamāka tiruttaṟṟa nilattāl van=ta nellu Āḻvār śrīpaṇṭārattu paḷḷikoṇṭān kaṭavo nilattukku An=tarāyamum yum paṇṭaive ṭṭiyum tiruvācalil pon=ta kuṭimaiyum tirunāḷ kuṭimaiyum maṟṟum Epper paṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭavarallātārākavum Itil tiruttuvāciyāl vanta nelkoṇṭu Ātinātat tirunantavā
nam paṇiceyvār vaṅkipuṟattu viṟṟirun=tān Uḷḷiṭṭār Aivarkku nāḷonṟukku pperāl nel perāl kācu Iraṇṭuṅ ko Ivan varkkattārumey n=ta(ti)vānam ceytu Innilam Anupavikkak kaṭavārāka Iniparī Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār kārāṇaiviḻupparaiyarkku Āḻvār kaṉmikaḷom śrīvayiṣṇavakkaṇa
kku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Ārāvamutin Eḻuttu koyil kaṇakku Anan=tanārāyaṇan (ṉārāyaṇan) Eḻuttu ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai toṇṭa ṭitāsan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai tiruvaraṅkamāḷi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mārkka maṅkalattu Arīkulavā Ivai tiruvaraṅkatāsan Eḻuttu śrī paṇṭāra vāriyam Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān cirākavan Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai pāratāyantaniyiḷañciṅkattiṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āritan kurukai kāvalan Ārāvamutin Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan Ārāvamutu cirāmaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kecuvan Aṟivariyān Eḻuttu Itu śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 24.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
